title: M.Phil / Ph.D Jobs 2026 – Dean/Director
shortInfo: GBPUAT Recruitment 2026: 10 Dean and Director vacancies announced. Apply offline till 25 June 2026 at GBPUAT Official Website.

basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Dean Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture & Technology
basic_details.short_information: GBPUAT Recruitment 2026: 10 Dean and Director vacancies announced. Apply offline till 25 June 2026 at GBPUAT Official Website.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the GBPUAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate degree in relevant field, 15 years teaching/research/extension experience, At least 5 years as Professor or equivalent, Ability to conduct and guide research

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.gbpuat.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Dean/Director posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the GBPUAT Dean/Director posts is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Dean/Director posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies available for the Dean/Director posts in GBPUAT.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Doctorate degree in a relevant field with extensive teaching, research, and extension experience.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Dean/Director positions?
faq.answer: The retirement age is 65 years, and candidates must have at least two and a half years of service remaining as of 25.06.2026.

faq.question: What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 1500/-.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the GBPUAT Dean/Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per the 7th Pay Commission.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be found on the official website of GBPUAT, www.gbpuat.ac.in, and links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: What is the official website of GBPUAT?
faq.answer: The official website of Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture & Technology is www.gbpuat.ac.in.
